name: Create SD Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Create SD Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in drug store, dispensing pharmacy, and nursing care businesses in Japan. The company sells pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, food products, daily goods, etc. It also operates and manages nursing homes and functional training type day service centers, as well as provides cleaning services for shops and administrative assistance work, etc. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
